verses.latin_vulgate: In finem. Canticum psalmi resurrectionis.   Jubilate Deo, omnis terra ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַ֭מְנַצֵּחַ שִׁ֣יר מִזְמ֑וֹר הָרִ֥יעוּ לֵ֝אלֹהִ֗ים כׇּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: Make a joyful noise unto God, all ye lands:

verses.latin_vulgate: psalmum dicite nomini ejus ;  date gloriam laudi ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זַמְּר֥וּ כְבֽוֹד־שְׁמ֑וֹ שִׂ֥ימוּ כָ֝ב֗וֹד תְּהִלָּתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Sing forth the honour of his name: make his praise glorious.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dicite Deo : Quam terribilia sunt opera tua, Domine !  in multitudine virtutis tuæ mentientur tibi inimici tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִמְר֣וּ לֵ֭אלֹהִים מַה־נּוֹרָ֣א מַעֲשֶׂ֑יךָ בְּרֹ֥ב עֻ֝זְּךָ֗ יְֽכַחֲשׁ֖וּ לְךָ֣ אֹיְבֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Say unto God, How terrible art thou in thy works! through the greatness of thy power shall thine enemies submit themselves unto thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnis terra adoret te, et psallat tibi ;  psalmum dicat nomini tuo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־הָאָ֤רֶץ ׀ יִשְׁתַּחֲו֣וּ לְ֭ךָ וִיזַמְּרוּ־לָ֑ךְ יְזַמְּר֖וּ שִׁמְךָ֣ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: All the earth shall worship thee, and shall sing unto thee; they shall sing to thy name. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venite, et videte opera Dei :  terribilis in consiliis super filios hominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְכ֣וּ וּ֭רְאוּ מִפְעֲל֣וֹת אֱלֹהִ֑ים נוֹרָ֥א עֲ֝לִילָ֗ה עַל־בְּנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Come and see the works of God: he is terrible in his doing toward the children of men.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui convertit mare in aridam ;  in flumine pertransibunt pede :  ibi lætabimur in ipso.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָ֤פַךְ יָ֨ם ׀ לְֽיַבָּשָׁ֗ה בַּ֭נָּהָר יַעַבְר֣וּ בְרָ֑גֶל שָׁ֝֗ם נִשְׂמְחָה־בּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: He turned the sea into dry land: they went through the flood on foot: there did we rejoice in him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui dominatur in virtute sua in æternum ;  oculi ejus super gentes respiciunt :  qui exasperant non exaltentur in semetipsis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֹ֘שֵׁ֤ל בִּגְבוּרָת֨וֹ ׀ עוֹלָ֗ם עֵ֭ינָיו בַּגּוֹיִ֣ם תִּצְפֶּ֑ינָה הַסּוֹרְרִ֓ים ׀ אַל־[יָר֖וּמוּ] (ירימו) לָ֣מוֹ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: He ruleth by his power for ever; his eyes behold the nations: let not the rebellious exalt themselves. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedicite, gentes, Deum nostrum,  et auditam facite vocem laudis ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּרְכ֖וּ עַמִּ֥ים ׀ אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ וְ֝הַשְׁמִ֗יעוּ ק֣וֹל תְּהִלָּתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: O bless our God, ye people, and make the voice of his praise to be heard:

verses.latin_vulgate: qui posuit animam meam ad vitam,  et non dedit in commotionem pedes meos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשָּׂ֣ם נַ֭פְשֵׁנוּ בַּחַיִּ֑ים וְלֹֽא־נָתַ֖ן לַמּ֣וֹט רַגְלֵֽנוּ׃
verses.king_james: Which holdeth our soul in life, and suffereth not our feet to be moved.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam probasti nos, Deus ;  igne nos examinasti, sicut examinatur argentum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־בְחַנְתָּ֥נוּ אֱלֹהִ֑ים צְ֝רַפְתָּ֗נוּ כִּצְרׇף־כָּֽסֶף׃
verses.king_james: For thou, O God, hast proved us: thou hast tried us, as silver is tried.

verses.latin_vulgate: Induxisti nos in laqueum ;  posuisti tribulationes in dorso nostro ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲבֵאתָ֥נוּ בַמְּצוּדָ֑ה שַׂ֖מְתָּ מוּעָקָ֣ה בְמׇתְנֵֽינוּ׃
verses.king_james: Thou broughtest us into the net; thou laidst affliction upon our loins.

verses.latin_vulgate: imposuisti homines super capita nostra.  Transivimus per ignem et aquam,  et eduxisti nos in refrigerium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִרְכַּ֥בְתָּֽ אֱנ֗וֹשׁ לְרֹ֫אשֵׁ֥נוּ בָּֽאנוּ־בָאֵ֥שׁ וּבַמַּ֑יִם וַ֝תּוֹצִיאֵ֗נוּ לָרְוָיָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast caused men to ride over our heads; we went through fire and through water: but thou broughtest us out into a wealthy place.

verses.latin_vulgate: Introibo in domum tuam in holocaustis ;  reddam tibi vota mea
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָב֣וֹא בֵיתְךָ֣ בְעוֹל֑וֹת אֲשַׁלֵּ֖ם לְךָ֣ נְדָרָֽי׃
verses.king_james: I will go into thy house with burnt offerings: I will pay thee my vows,

verses.latin_vulgate: quæ distinxerunt labia mea :  et locutum est os meum in tribulatione mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁר־פָּצ֥וּ שְׂפָתָ֑י וְדִבֶּר־פִּ֝֗י בַּצַּר־לִֽי׃
verses.king_james: Which my lips have uttered, and my mouth hath spoken, when I was in trouble.

verses.latin_vulgate: Holocausta medullata offeram tibi, cum incenso arietum ;  offeram tibi boves cum hircis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֹ֘ל֤וֹת מֵיחִ֣ים אַֽעֲלֶה־לָּ֭ךְ עִם־קְטֹ֣רֶת אֵילִ֑ים אֶ֥עֱשֶֽׂה־בָקָ֖ר עִם־עַתּוּדִ֣ים סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: I will offer unto thee burnt sacrifices of fatlings, with the incense of rams; I will offer bullocks with goats. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venite, audite, et narrabo, omnes qui timetis Deum,  quanta fecit animæ meæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְכוּ־שִׁמְע֣וּ וַ֭אֲסַפְּרָה כׇּל־יִרְאֵ֣י אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֲשֶׁ֖ר עָשָׂ֣ה לְנַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.king_james: Come and hear, all ye that fear God, and I will declare what he hath done for my soul.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ad ipsum ore meo clamavi,  et exaltavi sub lingua mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵלָ֥יו פִּֽי־קָרָ֑אתִי וְ֝רוֹמַ֗ם תַּ֣חַת לְשׁוֹנִֽי׃
verses.king_james: I cried unto him with my mouth, and he was extolled with my tongue.

verses.latin_vulgate: Iniquitatem si aspexi in corde meo,  non exaudiet Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֭וֶן אִם־רָאִ֣יתִי בְלִבִּ֑י לֹ֖א יִשְׁמַ֣ע ׀ אֲדֹנָֽי׃
verses.king_james: If I regard iniquity in my heart, the Lord will not hear me:

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea exaudivit Deus,  et attendit voci deprecationis meæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֭כֵן שָׁמַ֣ע אֱלֹהִ֑ים הִ֝קְשִׁ֗יב בְּק֣וֹל תְּפִלָּתִֽי׃
verses.king_james: But verily God hath heard me; he hath attended to the voice of my prayer.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictus Deus, qui non amovit orationem meam,  et misericordiam suam a me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּר֥וּךְ אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹֽא־הֵסִ֘יר־תְּפִלָּתִ֥י וְ֝חַסְדּ֗וֹ מֵאִתִּֽי׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Blessed be God, which hath not turned away my prayer, nor his mercy from me.
